name: Cortex XDR
description: Integrates with Palo Alto Networks Cortex XDR API for endpoint detection, incident management, and automated response actions

actions.name: Get Incidents
actions.description: Retrieve a list of incidents filtered by modification time, creation time, or incident IDs

parameters.name: search_from
parameters.description: Starting offset within the query result set

parameters.name: search_to
parameters.description: Ending offset within the query result set

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort field and order (e.g., creation_time ASC)

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: JSON array of filter objects for incident search criteria

actions.name: Get Incident Details
actions.description: Retrieve extra data for a specific incident including alerts and key artifacts

parameters.name: incident_id
parameters.description: The unique ID of the incident

parameters.name: alerts_limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of alerts to return

actions.name: Get Alerts
actions.description: Retrieve a list of alerts with filtering options

parameters.name: search_from
parameters.description: Starting offset within the query result set

parameters.name: search_to
parameters.description: Ending offset within the query result set

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: JSON array of filter objects for alert search criteria

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort field and order

actions.name: Get All Endpoints
actions.description: Retrieve a list of endpoints with filtering options such as status, platform, or hostname

parameters.name: search_from
parameters.description: Starting offset within the query result set

parameters.name: search_to
parameters.description: Ending offset within the query result set

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: JSON array of filter objects (endpoint_id_list, hostname, ip_list, platform, etc.)

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort field and order

actions.name: Isolate Endpoints
actions.description: Isolate one or more endpoints from the network (max 1000 per request)

parameters.name: endpoint_id_list
parameters.description: JSON array of endpoint IDs to isolate

actions.name: Unisolate Endpoints
actions.description: Cancel isolation on one or more endpoints to restore network access

parameters.name: endpoint_id_list
parameters.description: JSON array of endpoint IDs to unisolate

actions.name: Scan Endpoints
actions.description: Initiate a scan on one or more endpoints

parameters.name: endpoint_id_list
parameters.description: JSON array of endpoint IDs to scan

parameters.name: filters
parameters.description: JSON array of filter objects to select endpoints for scanning

actions.name: Quarantine File
actions.description: Quarantine a file on selected endpoints using file hash and path

parameters.name: endpoint_id_list
parameters.description: JSON array of endpoint IDs (max 1000)

parameters.name: file_path
parameters.description: The full path of the file to quarantine

parameters.name: file_hash
parameters.description: SHA256 hash of the file to quarantine

actions.name: Run XQL Query
actions.description: Execute an XQL query for advanced threat hunting across endpoint data

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The XQL query string to execute

parameters.name: timeframe
parameters.description: JSON object with from/to timestamps for the query window

actions.name: Add to Blocklist
actions.description: Add file hashes to the blocklist to prevent execution across all endpoints

parameters.name: hash_list
parameters.description: JSON array of SHA256 hashes to block

parameters.name: comment
parameters.description: Comment explaining why the hashes were blocked
